"Is your practice losing valuable hours every week to admin tasks instead of patient care?"
Profile Overview

I help clinics and healthcare providers reclaim hours lost to administrative overload — without adding training burden to their plate.

Busy clinic owners often avoid delegating because onboarding feels like more work, not less. I solve that by stepping into your existing systems quietly and efficiently, with zero disruption to patient care.

What I take off your plate:

  • ✓
    Clinical Intake & EMR/EHR Administration — Accurately logging client intake data, organizing case files, and updating patient directories
  • ✓
    Data Management & Spreadsheet Architecture — Building, cleaning, and managing structured logs or tracking sheets in Google Sheets and Excel with zero formatting errors
  • ✓
    Inbox & Appointment Triage — Organizing busy communication channels, sorting stakeholder emails, managing clinical calendars, and coordinating cross-border appointments
  • ✓
    Operations & Clinic Task Coordination — Maintaining clear operational timelines, project pipelines, and team tasks using organizational tools like Notion and Trello

With a healthcare background and a strong grasp of data integrity, I require minimal onboarding — just clear access and a quick systems walkthrough.

Currently accepting new remote partnerships. Let's talk about what's eating your week.

Work Samples & Projects
Waste Management Action Research — Wakiso District
Public Health Research  |  Uganda  |  July 2025
Research & Public Health

Led a participatory action research study addressing critical public health challenges at a slaughterhouse in Wakiso District, Uganda. Used focus group discussions, in-depth interviews, and transect walks to identify the primary health risk and deliver a full structured report with recommendations.

80%

Methods Used

  • • 80% segregation compliance

Benefits
1
Enhanced business operations — cleaner environment reduced disease risk, pest activity, and compliance issues
2
Improved public health — systematic waste segregation reduced health hazards and contamination
3
Scalable model — low-cost, community-driven approach designed for replication in similar settings

Clinical Documentation — SOAP Note (Acusimple)
Acusimple  |  EHR Charting  |  Mock Patient Case
Clinical Documentation

A SOAP (Subjective, Objective, Assessment, Plan) note is a standardized clinical documentation format used across EHR/EMR systems to record patient encounters clearly and consistently. This mock pediatric case was charted and signed off in Acusimple to demonstrate accurate, structured clinical documentation — organizing patient history, vitals, lab results, and physical exam findings into a clean, provider-ready note.

SOAP Notes EHR / EMR Charting Clinical Documentation Acusimple Data Accuracy
Patient Intake & Registration — Acusimple
Acusimple  |  Patient Intake  |  Mock Patient Record
Patient Intake

Set up a new mock patient record in Acusimple's EHR system, accurately capturing demographic and contact details from the first point of entry. Clean, error-free intake is the foundation for smooth scheduling, secure communication, and reliable records further down the line.

Patient Intake New Patient Registration EHR Data Entry Acusimple Attention to Detail
